answer: task_shape=deterministic-sub-dag: four independent specified migration leaves share one schema and deterministic join. Keep executor=workflow as cross-host planning semantics. The Codex origin is the command surface; real leaves run on an exact qualified harness+surface through Codex-native trackable background Shell/subagent mechanisms, never an invented Claude Workflow API. The implementation leaves require T1, then exact role/live-admission/capacity/workspace/traceability qualification; rank and fallback only among qualified T1 candidates. Spawn each leaf, bind and link its real recon-able handle, then enter in_flight. When runtimes terminate, terminalize their agent records but keep the parent active; collect all artifacts, run deterministic join, and independently verify diff/tests/acceptance/content hash. Only then may the workflow parent become done/verified; otherwise retry or replan.
